camp_promote_2026.seo_title: Help Us Spread the Word — 3rd Gangjeong Peace & Music Camp 2026 Social Kit
camp_promote_2026.seo_description: A social media kit for musicians joining the 3rd Gangjeong Peace and Music Camp. Download the poster and timetable, and copy ready-to-post captions in Korean and English for Instagram and Facebook.
camp_promote_2026.hero_subtitle: The easiest way to share the 3rd Gangjeong Peace & Music Camp on social media
camp_promote_2026.intro_lead: Your voice is the most powerful invitation of all. Copy the images and captions below and post them on Instagram or Facebook. One post sends the wave of peace a little farther. 🌊

howto_steps.title: Save an image
howto_steps.body: Pick a poster or the timetable. On mobile, press and hold the image to save it; on desktop, use the [Save image] button.

howto_steps.title: Copy a caption
howto_steps.body: Grab the long feed caption or the short story caption — whichever fits. Feel free to edit and make it your own.

howto_steps.title: Post and tag us
howto_steps.body: Share the image and caption on your Instagram feed or story, Facebook, and tag @peace_music_in_gangjeong. We'll reshare it.

camp_promote_2026.images_note: Full-resolution originals. Post one, or share several together.
camp_promote_2026.feed_text:
🌈 The 3rd Gangjeong Peace & Music Camp — Stop the War

Gangjeong Peace and Music Camp is a festival and an act of solidarity by people who dream of a world without war. Across borders and languages, we sing for peace in the most universal language of all — music.

When we sing, dance, and hold one another, war falls silent and the wave of peace reaches farther. 🌊

In an age scarred by massacre and war, the village of Gangjeong has not stopped singing for peace for 19 years. We'll be waiting for you there.

I'll be there too. See you in Gangjeong this June. 🎶

🦀 June 5 (Fri) – 7 (Sun), 2026
🐬 Gangjeong Sports Park, Seogwipo, Jeju, South Korea
🌿 50 musician acts · Peace Market & more
🔗 peaceandmusic.net
@peace_music_in_gangjeong

camp_promote_2026.info_place: Gangjeong Sports Park, Seogwipo, Jeju, South Korea
camp_promote_2026.thanks_body: Every post from you means so much to the peace movement in Gangjeong. See you there in June.
